Executes the main function from the CLI module.

# Purpose
The code is a short script that imports the `main` function from a module named `cli` within the same package. It then executes the `main` function. This script serves as an entry point to run the command-line interface defined in the `cli` module. The functionality is narrow, focusing on initiating the CLI process.
# Imports and Dependencies
